# Srushti Publications - llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and agents understand our website.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# About
> Srushti Publications is a Bengaluru-based Kannada publishing house specializing in translating world-renowned international books into Kannada. We sell exclusively our own original publications.

## Key Facts
- **Name**: Srushti Publications (ಸೃಷ್ಟಿ ಪಬ್ಲಿಕೇಷನ್ಸ್)
- **Founded**: 2010
- **Location**: 121, 13th Main Rd, MC Layout, Vijayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560040
- **Phone**: +91 98450 96668
- **Email**: srushtinagesh@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://srushtipublications.com

## What We Do
Srushti Publications translates and publishes Kannada editions of internationally acclaimed books. We specialize in making global literature accessible to Kannada-speaking readers across India. Every book on this website is a Srushti Publications original — we do not sell third-party books.

## Categories
- Translated International Literature (ಅನುವಾದಿತ ಅಂತಾರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಸಾಹಿತ್ಯ)
- Kannada Novels & Fiction
- Non-Fiction & Self-Help Books in Kannada
- Educational Books in Kannada
- Children's Books in Kannada (ಮಕ್ಕಳ ಪುಸ್ತಕಗಳು)
- History & Biography in Kannada

## Website Sections
- [Home](https://srushtipublications.com) — Featured books, new releases, bestsellers
- [All Books](https://srushtipublications.com/books) — Complete catalog
- [Categories](https://srushtipublications.com/categories) — Books by genre
- [About Us](https://srushtipublications.com/about) — Our story and mission
- [Contact](https://srushtipublications.com/contact) — Get in touch
- [FAQ](https://srushtipublications.com/faq) — Common questions
- [Shipping Info](https://srushtipublications.com/shipping) — Delivery details
- [Refund Policy](https://srushtipublications.com/refund) — Returns and refunds
- [Privacy Policy](https://srushtipublications.com/privacy) — Data practices
- [Terms & Conditions](https://srushtipublications.com/terms) — Legal terms

## Shopping Information
- **Free Shipping**: Orders above ₹500 in Karnataka; ₹1000+ for other states
- **Payment Methods**: UPI, Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking, Cash on Delivery (COD)
- **Payment Gateway**: Razorpay (secure)
- **Delivery Time**: 2-3 days Bengaluru, 3-5 days Karnataka, 5-7 days South India, 7-10 days rest of India
- **Returns**: 7-day return window for damaged/incorrect books

## Ordering
Customers can:
1. Browse books at /books or /categories
2. Add to cart
3. Register/Login or checkout as guest
4. Pay securely via Razorpay
5. Track orders via /track-order

## Technical Details
- **Platform**: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- **Language**: Bilingual — Kannada (primary) and English
- **Currency**: Indian Rupee (INR ₹)
- **Shipping**: India-wide
- **GST**: Included in all prices

## Social Media
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/srushtipublications
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/srushtipublications
